title: Mailchimp vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp vs Klaviyo: pricing, features, and performance. Find the best email marketing tool for your business needs.
intro: Mailchimp and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp excels for beginners and small businesses seeking an affordable, all-in-one solution, while Klaviyo is purpose-built for e-commerce brands requiring advanced automation and SMS capabilities. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your marketing needs and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, A/B testing, segmentation
comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce integrations, predictive analytics, SMS, flows, reviews

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business with a tight budget
You need a general-purpose marketing platform with landing pages and basic automation
You want to earn affiliate commissions by promoting the platform
choose_b_if: You operate an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You need advanced segmentation, SMS marketing, and predictive analytics
You want higher-rated customer support and more sophisticated automation flows

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp is better for beginners and small businesses seeking affordability and simplicity, with a starting price of just $13/month. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce businesses requiring advanced automation, SMS capabilities, and predictive analytics, despite its higher $45/month starting price. Choose based on your industry and feature requirements rather than overall quality.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper, with a free tier and paid plans starting at $13/month. Klaviyo's paid plans begin at $45/month, making it roughly 3.5x more expensive at entry level. However, both offer free tiers with 500 subscribers, so you can test each platform before committing financially.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your email list and basic data between platforms, though the process requires exporting your contacts and manually setting up campaigns in Mailchimp. Switching from Klaviyo's advanced features (like SMS and predictive analytics) to Mailchimp means losing some functionality, so carefully evaluate whether Mailchimp meets your needs before migrating.
